calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-24-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-24-2003 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assignment by the Department of the PJ. for Court Trial-settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha/ V. Mack, CSR: Valerie Papale.
11:40 a.m. - Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. for Plaintiff Glenn Meyers Trustee of the Myers Family Trust. Glenn Meyers is also present in court.
Defendant, Jules Radcliffe present in pro per.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows: Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendants for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 862 Shotwell St., #1, San Francisco, CA.
Immediate WRIT of possession for the premises will issue, plaintiff will stay execution of this writ on the condition that defendant vacate the premises on or before 5:00 p.m. on Dec. 31, 2003 and pays $890.00 by 5:30 p.m. on Nov. 25, 2003 at counsel's office located at 1655 Market St., 2nd Flr.
If Defendant vacated on Dec. 31, 2003 under bloom clean condition and return all keys to counsel, Plaintiff waives backrents, securtiy deposit of $610.00 to be refunded within 7 business days after final inspection. Defendant waives last month rent and is entitle to remove personal belongings that were read into the record.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Each party waives claim against the other, each to bears its own costs and attorney's fees, any items left in the premises will be disposed of.
No one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2003 Off Calendar
